personal.name: Don Dashitha Madhukara Jayasingha
personal.title: Final Year IT Undergraduate | Process Analyst at HCLTech | Software Developer
personal.bio: A results-driven IT undergraduate and Process Analyst with experience in data analytics, software engineering, and process optimization. Bridging the gap between technical innovation and business efficiency.

about.intro: I am a highly motivated final-year Information Technology undergraduate student at Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology (SLIIT), specializing in Software Engineering and Data Analytics. Alongside my academic journey, I work as a Process Analyst at HCLTech, where I apply analytical frameworks, automate workflows, and improve operational metrics.
about.education: SLIIT - BSc (Hons) in Information Technology (Expected Graduation: 2027)
about.careerGoals: To leverage my dual expertise in process engineering and software development to build intelligent, scalable software solutions and machine learning systems that drive business transformation.

experience.description: Analyze operations, manage reporting structures, and identify efficiency bottlenecks.
points: Specialized in Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) workflows, accelerating claim audits and reducing delays by 15%.
Engineered custom Power BI dashboards for operational claims analysis, providing stakeholders with real-time actionable insights.
Automated recurring data aggregation and reporting routines, saving over 12 hours of manual effort per week.
Led process improvement workshops aligning operational workflows with international compliance standards.

projects.title: SmartCost
projects.description: An AI-powered Business Performance Prediction System tailored for Micro-SMEs to forecast margins, operational costs, and growth indexes.
achievements: Achieved 94.2% accuracy in operational cost forecasting using random forest regressors.
Created an intuitive dashboard presenting interactive cash-flow simulations for micro-business owners.
Implemented secure JWT user authentication and automated report exports in PDF/XLS formats.

projects.title: Smart Order Recommendation System
projects.description: A deep-learning based recommendation engine designed for retail inventories to optimize warehouse distributions and suggest order sizes.
achievements: Reduced warehouse order inaccuracies by 22% using custom collaborative filtering algorithms.
Built dynamic data pipelines fetching inventory logs, reducing calculation latency down to less than 200ms.

projects.title: Federated Learning IDS for Smart Home IoT
projects.description: A privacy-preserving Intrusion Detection System utilizing Federated Learning to detect anomalous network packets across IoT edge devices without sharing raw data.
achievements: Engineered decentralized neural network aggregation, achieving 97.6% threat detection rate.
Ensured zero raw network log leaks, adhering to strict GDPR and local data privacy policies.

research.title: Privacy-Preserving Network Threat Detection in Smart Homes via Federated Learning
research.authors: Jayasingha, D. D. M., et al.
research.venue: IEEE International Conference on Advanced IT Applications
research.description: Explores decentralized model updates and security protocols under modern IoT device environments.

research.title: Machine Learning for Cost Projections in Micro-SMEs: SmartCost Framework
research.venue: International Journal of Computational Business Intelligence
research.description: Presents empirical results of using gradient-boosting algorithms for predicting overhead costs of micro-SMEs in South Asia.

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Scientist Associate

testimonials.name: Senior Operations Manager
testimonials.message: Dashitha is exceptional at understanding process bottlenecks and translating them into robust reporting structures. His analytics work helped our team reduce claim resolution times significantly.

testimonials.name: SLIIT Project Supervisor
testimonials.message: An outstanding student researcher who showed exceptional engineering skills in developing the Federated Learning Intrusion Detection System. His dedication to academic rigor is highly commendable.
